{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of Rolling Earth
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Path of Rolling Earth]] allows a user to funnel the strength of boulders through their arms and weapon.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
